title: Buggy’s Cannon Threatens Orange Town
description: On pages 1–4, Buggy’s crew threatens Orange Town with overwhelming force, turning the town itself into a hostage.
scene: Buggy’s pirates rely on spectacle and destruction, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami are forced to react under pressure.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Dammit, how dare you treat my treasure like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Puuht! Puuheht!! That's dirty, stop it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't you dare repeat those words ever again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh... even though I don't know what sort of relation- ship you had with shanks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's my own choice how I can speak speak of him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do you think Captain Buggy will actually lose? Captain's real skills will start now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Aiyayah... I was so fast- nated, I kept on watching

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've got to quickly steal the warehouse treasure and run away!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: It's been so long and the chief still hasn't returned!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: some- thing's definitely happened in the village...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yeah... and we've also heard a couple of cannon noises...

summary: The part shows how Buggy rules through fear, while the Straw Hats begin breaking that fear through defiance and improvisation.
